title: abnormally thin
description: A resource pack that replaces the bulky three-plane cross from the Team Abnormal's mods with the classic vanilla styled two-plane cross.
body:
Team Abnormals' mods are always great, but a personal grievance I have with them is how bulky some plants you will commonly see are compared to the vanilla ones. This mod shears down the models to be as thin as vanilla ones. 

The Large Tall Grass from Environmental and the Beachgrass from Upgrade Aquatic are the only ones touched so far. This mod will also help with shading issues resulting from the original model and display more of the texture.
